title: Smoked Norwegian Beef Stew
description: A hearty German-inspired stew made with smoked Norwegian beef, beets, and dense vegetables.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Brown the beef in batches, about 5 minutes per batch. Remove from heat and set aside.
Add more oil if necessary, then sauté the onion and carrot until tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the diced beetroot, browned beef, and stew to the pot. Stir to combine.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Add the bay leaves and bring the stew to a boil.
Cover the pot and transfer to the oven.
Bake at 300°F (150°C) for 2 1/2 hours, or until the beef is tender.
Remove the bay leaves and serve hot.
Serve with crusty bread or over egg noodles for a filling meal.
Garnish with fresh parsley, if desired.
